scripts.format: pnpm run prettier && pnpm run format:py
scripts.format:check: pnpm run prettier . --check && pnpm run format:py:check
scripts.format:py: uv run --project server ruff format server
scripts.format:py:check: uv run --project server ruff format server --check
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:py && pnpm run check:py && cd client && pnpm run lint
scripts.lint:check: pnpm run lint:py:check && pnpm run check:py && cd client && pnpm run lint:check
scripts.lint:py: uv run --project server ruff check server --fix
scripts.lint:py:check: uv run --project server ruff check server
